title: MAtmos - Ambient sound
description: The MAtmos ambient sound mod adds environmental sounds and interaction sounds to greatly improve your audio experience during your games.
body:
Matmos Ambient Sounds completely transforms Minecraft’s soundscape by adding more than 160 immersive and dynamic ambient sound effects.
Instead of static stereo sounds centered on the player, Matmos generates a true spatial sound environment that reacts to the world around you.

 

The mod constantly analyzes where you are:
✔ Biome (forest, desert, swamp, etc.)
✔ Indoors or outdoors
✔ In caves or the Nether
✔ On a cliff, near water, in dense forests…

And adapts the audio experience in real time.

You will hear:
- Birds, crows, crickets, wolves, frogs, insects
- Branches creaking, wind gusts, weather systems, storms
-  Cave echoes, reverb, underground ambiance
-  Surface and underwater player interaction sounds
- Villages, items and inventory handling
- Nether atmosphere and environmental effects
… and more every update!

Every sound is spatial and can move, approaching or fading depending on where the source is located.

⚠️ Dependencies
Requires TCTCore (V5.2+)

📌 Supported Versions
Minecraft 1.1 → 1.21.5
(Some features vary depending on version — see compatibility section)

⚙️ Settings
Once installed, settings can be changed in:
H → Mod Settings → TCT Core Menu
You can also adjust audio categories in Minecraft’s sound menu.

Patch Notes — Matmos Ambient Sounds
Matmos V7.4 — Supported Versions 1.17.1 to 1.21.8
- Added support for Minecraft 1.21.8
- Water sounds modified for a more natural and realistic effect
- Wind sounds modified for a more natural and realistic effect
- Balanced audio levels for a more even and immersive sound experience
- Some features removed to standardize all supported versions
- Removed config json
- Removed implementation of Sound Physics Remastered
- Bug Fix: Issue with certain Forge setups on version 1.20.1
- Bug Fix: Night ambiance stopped during night and continued in daytime
- Multiplayer Bug Fix: Item interaction sounds triggered for all players
- Multiplayer Bug Fix: Opening an internet link triggered sound events for all players

Matmos V7.1 Supported Versions 1.18.2 to 1.21.5
- Bug fixes and optimization improvements
- Volume balancing for several sound categories
- Added support for Minecraft 1.21.5

Matmos V7.0 — Supported Versions 1.12.2 to 1.21.4
- Complete code rewriting for improved performance
- Significant optimization improvements
- Added many new forest environment sounds
- Updated environmental and spatial sound behavior
- New settings interface
- Support for settings toml for external configuration editing
- Improved and reworked various audio files
- Added support for multiple Minecraft versions 1.12.2 1.14.4 1.15.2 1.16.5 1.17.1 1.18.2 1.21.4
- Initial Sound Physics support removed in V7.2
